title: General Legal Aid * Agricultural Laborers - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > General Legal Aid * Agricultural Laborers 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Agricultural Laborers Migrants Native American Community Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON FOREST GROVE FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help to migrant and seasonal farmworkers with employment, housing, unemployment, and tax issues. Most employment and housing issues are related to payment of wages, unauthorized pay deductions, poor living conditions in labor camps, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health and safety conditions on the job, pesticide problems, and discrimination. Also gives referrals to other kinds of legal programs. Eligibility: Agricultural (including seasonal) workers who have experienced civil legal problems in the State of Oregon Hours: By appointment only (503) 214-1384 Visit Website More Details LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON LEGAL AID SERVICES OF OREGON SALEM FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides help to migrant and seasonal farmworkers with employment, housing, unemployment, and tax issues. Most employment and housing issues are related to payment of wages, unauthorized pay deductions, poor living conditions in labor camps, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health and safety conditions on the job, pesticide problems, and discrimination. Also gives referrals to other kinds of legal programs. Eligibility: Agricultural (including seasonal) workers who have experienced civil legal problems in the State of Oregon Hours: By appointment only (503) 981-5291 Visit Website More Details NOWIA UNETE CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with filing claims for unpaid wages, legal assistance, mental health supports, temporary lodging, food boxes and vouchers, clothing, and relocation assistance. 607 W Main Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed in the illegal marijuana industry Hours: Monday-Friday noon-3pm and 4pm-7pm Email (541) 840-9669 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LAW CENTER OREGON LAW CENTER GRESHAM FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with civil (non-criminal) employment issues such as unauthorized pay deductions, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health health and safety conditions, pesticide concerns, work related sexual harassment, and problems with work-related housing. Also provides information and referral for other types of legal programs. 138 NE 3rd Steet Suite 203 Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed as agricultural workers including migrant and seasonal farmworkers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 726-4381 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON LAW CENTER OREGON LAW CENTER WOODBURN FARMWORKER OFFICE FARMWORKER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with civil (non-criminal) employment issues such as unauthorized pay deductions, retaliation for asserting legal rights, poor health health and safety conditions, pesticide concerns, work related sexual harassment, and problems with work-related housing. Also provides information and referral for other types of legal programs. 999 N Cascade Drive Woodburn, OR 97071 Eligibility: Individuals who are employed as agricultural workers including migrant and seasonal farmworkers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 981-0336 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NOWIA UNETE CANNABIS WORKER RESILIENCE PROJECT OREGON LAW CENTER FARMWORKER PROGRAM OREGON LAW CENTER FARMWORKER PROGRAM
